ead.archdesc:
======= RMA01797Cornell Society of Hotelmen records28-5-1797Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
April 20142B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
cmrceThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:31:40 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Cornell Society of Hotelmen records
Cornell Society of Hotelmen
28-5-1797
3.7 cubic feet. 3.7 cubic feet.
1928-1997. Correspondence, reports, financial records. Includes bulletins, correspondence, reports, receipts, minutes, bylaws, membership lists, treasurer's reports, class rosters, and other records of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen pertaining to hotel legislation, Cornell University School of Hotel Administration, Society events, and other related topics. Collection material in English 2100805
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
April 2014
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, April 2014
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes bulletins, correspondence, reports, receipts, minutes, bylaws, membership lists, treasurer's reports, class rosters, and other records of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen pertaining to hotel legislation, Cornell University School of Hotel Administration, Society events, and other related topics.
General
See also School of Hotel Administration Photographs and Ephemera, #28-10-4164 for photographs of Hotelmen luncheons (1929, 1930, 1950)
Cite As:
Cornell Society of Hotelmen. Records, #28-5-1797. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Hotelkeepers. Hotel management. Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration -- : Societies, etc.

Scope and Contents
Includes Fall and Winter issues for 1989 and the Fall issue for 1990Thumbnail Sketch of the Origin of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen - by John Courtney1948248Annual Reception Program1965249European Chapter Society of Hotelmen 30th Anniversary Book 1961-19911991250European Chapter Society of Hotelmen 20th Anniversary Book 1961-19811991250Cornellian Council Bulletins (1936-1939)and various other publications1930-19493Correspondence1930-19593Directory of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen1925-19623New York State Hotel Association Bulletins1940-194941-2Class Lists1939-195243-6Correspondence to and from Robert Trier and Publications1927-194247Hotelmen Meeting - Address Given by John Crandall1964411Photographs used in Bulletins of the Cornell Society of Hotelmen421Stationery1986-1987422Hotel School History - Correspondence, Memos about the Book Proposed1987-1989423-24John MacFarlane Howie - Correspondence1939-1945425Leadership Files1987426Leadership Files1993-1995427Bullets from Bill Eaton1993428Membership - Correspondence, Meeting Minutes1987-1989429Membership - Correspondence, Meeting Minutes1990430Membership - Correspondence, Meeting Minutes1991-1992-06431Membership - Correspondence, Meeting Minutes1992-07-1994432John Roberts - Membership Correspondence1951-1975433John H. Sherry - Membership Correspondence1951-1969434Ballots and Membership Cards1972-1981435Chapter Presidents1976436Reception Invitations1959-1985437Guest Books1984-198819945Notebook containing Alumni
